overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt walking along a sunny riverbank. The character moves from a grassy wildflower area past a historic stone bridge and watermill, continuing along a sandy shore with distant mountains visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank with wildflowers approaching a stone bridge

events.description: stone bridge and watermill building come into view on the left
ground surface transitions from grass to mixed sand and rock

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the riverbank with swords on his back, approaching a stone bridge structure

entered.detail: small wooden house visible across the river on the distant shore
calm river water reflecting the blue sky
dense green deciduous trees lining the riverbank
clusters of purple wildflowers growing in the grass
distant mountain range visible on the horizon
large medieval stone arch bridge with multiple spans
stone watermill structure with wooden roof adjacent to the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grassy riverbank with purple wildflowers in the foreground and a small house visible across the water. As Geralt walks forward, a large stone bridge and adjacent watermill come into view on the left, marking the transition from open grassland to a more structured riverside area with historic architecture.

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to sand and rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the sandy shore, moving away from the bridge area toward more open beach

entered.detail: large moss-covered rocks and boulders along the shoreline
sandy ground replacing the grassy terrain of the previous segment

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone bridge, the scene transitions to a sandy and rocky shoreline. The grass gives way to sand underfoot as Geralt moves along the water's edge, with the bridge and watermill now behind him and open beach stretching ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with wooden fencing

events.description: wooden fence posts appear along the right side of the beach path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the open beach with water to his left and scattered vegetation to his right

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts marking the edge of the beach path

segments.scene_description: The beach opens up into a wide sandy expanse with the river on the left and low vegetation on the right. Wooden fence posts appear and pass by on the right side as Geralt continues his steady walk along the shoreline, with distant mountains providing a scenic backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverbank with panoramic water views

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the sandy shore approaching a wide curve in the river with expansive views of the water and distant mountains

entered.detail: small wooden structure visible on the distant shore across the water

segments.scene_description: The final stretch reveals a panoramic view of the river widening ahead, with mountains framing the horizon. The trees that lined the right bank are now visible across the water on the left, and a small boathouse appears in the distance as Geralt continues along the sandy shore toward the curve of the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that transforms from a lush, wildflower-filled meadow into a rugged sandy shoreline. It begins amidst purple wildflowers and green grass with a small house visible across the water, moving forward as a large stone bridge and adjacent watermill emerge on the left. As the camera passes these historic structures, the structured riverside architecture fades into the background, and the terrain beneath shifts from soft grass to a rocky, sandy expanse. The scene finally opens up along the water's edge, leaving the bridge behind as the path stretches forward across an open beach.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that expands from a narrow shoreline into a wide, panoramic vista. It begins as the beach opens into a sandy expanse, with the river flowing to the left and low vegetation and wooden fence posts passing by on the right. As the walk continues, the horizon broadens to reveal distant mountains framing the landscape under a bright sky. The scene then shifts as the river widens ahead, moving the line of trees from the immediate bank to the far side of the water. Finally, the camera tracks toward a distant boathouse as the sandy shore curves along the widening river.
